issues.description: OnPlay effect uses AttachDon which attaches an active DON!! card. The text says 'Give up to 1 rested DON!! card' which means giving a rested DON!! (GiveDon with rested filter), not attaching an active one.
Second effect has wrong trigger. Text says '[On Your Opponent's Attack]' which means when opponent attacks (OnAttacked is correct trigger name). However, the condition and cost structure is wrong.

The TrashFromHand action should be a cost (optional: true), not a separate action. The text '[Once Per Turn] You may trash 1 card from your hand:' indicates this is an optional cost for the power reduction effect.
Missing oncePerTurn flag on the second effect, as text explicitly states '[Once Per Turn]'.
